name: EIDP, Inc.
business: Corteva provides seed and crop protection solutions to the agriculture industry. The company sells seeds with advanced germplasm and traits, as well as herbicides, insecticides, fungicides, and biologicals. It serves farmers in approximately 110 countries.

exposures.sentence: Corteva is a leading global provider of seed and crop protection solutions focused on the agriculture industry and contributing to a healthier, more secure and sustainable food supply.
Its digital solutions provide data driven insights to help farmers optimize yield and profitability.

catalysts.event: Announcement of separation of Seed and Crop Protection businesses into two standalone companies
catalysts.sentence: On October 1, 2025, the company announced its intent to separate its Seed and Crop Protection businesses into two standalone, publicly traded companies, in a transaction that is intended to be a tax-free spin-off for U.S. federal income tax purposes.

catalysts.event: Substantial completion of Crop Protection Operations Strategy Restructuring Program
catalysts.sentence: The restructuring actions associated with these charges are expected to be substantially complete by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Dividend increase approved by Board of Directors
catalysts.sentence: On July 29, 2025, the company's Board of Directors approved an approximately 6 percent increase in the quarterly common stock dividend from $0.17 per share to $0.18 per share.
